query: Run a health check on the wiki and tell me what needs fixing first.
expected_behavior: Runs python3 tools/wiki.py lint (and considers lint --strict for orphan pages) rather than manually grepping for issues
Distinguishes errors from warnings using lint --json rather than treating every flagged item as equally urgent
Recommends fixing highest-priority issues first rather than dumping the raw lint output unprioritized

Correctly notes that semantic (non-programmatic) checks like factual accuracy or cross-page contradictions require the quality/contradict/verify agents, not the lint command, and are out of this skill's own scope
